title: Mike Capozzola Kugelroni
description: "Hilarious... Twisted!” -RICHARD LEWIS 'Curb Your Enthusiasm' New York-raised, London-based, MIKE CAPOZZOLA is: The UK’s #1 (only) Italian-American Jewish Stand Up Comic! He's performed at comedy clubs, museums, synagogues, Hillels, Chabads, Jewish Community Centers and two Kosher breweries in most of the USA and in 26 countries. He's the son of two educators, a Jewish mother and an Italian-American father. Mike's not on TikTok- he just has decades of real world comedy chops and actual TV/ Film credits: www.IMDb.me/MikeCapozzola Event Notice & Admission Policy Please note that enhanced security measures will be in place at this event to ensure the safety and comfort of all attendees. Right of admission is reserved. Entry may be refused at the discretion of the performer and/or event security team. In any instance where admission is denied, a full refund will be provided.
content_warnings: This is NOT a political show and as such, there’s a zero-tolerance policy for agenda-based performance disruptions
